title: rhododendron × graveolens
intro: Rhododendron × graveolens, also known as Rosy Rhododendron or Graveolens, is a hybrid plant species within the Rhododendron genus, characterized by its fragrant flowers and medicinal properties. It has been traditionally used for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which have been utilized to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Rhododendron × graveolens include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, among others. Rhododendron × graveolens is often prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used topically in the form of ointments or salves.
